name: python3-macholib
title: python3-macholib
summary: module for Mach-O header analysis and editing (Python 3 interface)
description:
module for Mach-O header analysis and editing (Python 3 interface)
This module can be used to analyze and edit Mach-O headers, the executable
format used by Mac OS X.
It's typically used as a dependency analysis tool, and also to rewrite dylib
references in Mach-O headers to be @executable_path relative.
Though this tool targets a platform specific file format, it is pure Python
code that is platform and endian independent.
.
This package provides the Python 3.x module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-macholib because module for Mach-O header analysis and editing (Python 3 interface).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-macholib as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-macholib with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-macholib --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
